title: On My Wife's Birth-Day by Christopher Smart — Deep Poetry Lines
content:
'Tis Nancy's birth-day--raise your strains,
Ye nymphs of the Parnassian plains,
And sing with more than usual glee
To Nancy, who was born for me.

Tel

title: Jubilate Agno: Fragment C by Christopher Smart — Sad Poetry Lines
content:
Let Ramah rejoice with Cochineal.

Let Gaba rejoice with the Prickly Pear, which the Cochineal feeds on.

Let Nebo rejoice with the Myrtle-Leaved-Suma

title: Jubilate Agno: Fragment A by Christopher Smart — Sad Poetry Lines
content:
Rejoice in God, O ye Tongues; give the glory to the Lord, and the Lamb.

Nations, and languages, and every Creature, in which is the breath of Life.

title: Jubilate Agno: Fragment B, Part 4 by Christopher Smart — Sad Poetry Lines

title: Jubilate Agno: Fragment B, Part 3 by Christopher Smart — Sad Poetry Lines
content:
